name: xiao-guo
description: A cute chibi pixel art Chinese boy character. Round face with rosy cheeks, short black hair with a small red star hair clip. Wearing a traditional Chinese-style red mandarin collar jacket with golden frog button closures and dark pants. Small hands and feet. 2.5 head-to-body proportion. Cheerful and patriotic vibe, adorable and approachable. Suitable for all ages.
